review_title: Saves Time but Improves Content Quality
description: Superb Experience. Very easy to set up and use. Has helped me make quality content for my users along with saving time and efforts in researching topics.
author: MOUSAM C.
pros: Question research helps to judge what topic to write on. Content briefs helps to understand what should be the tone of writing which is useful for audience. Content curation gives a structure to write quality content. Unlimited question research queries helps to understand real user search query so that can be addressed effectively in the writing. Unlimited concept maps helps to know more about the unknown topics quickly. Integrations with other services saves time. FAQ Schema saves times by automatically making FAQ Schema based on the content written. So that we don't have to manually write them for each post. Answer Engine scans the entire website and helps to automatically answer the audience/user query when they search on the website. This is one of the best and useful feature of Frase. The support stuff and the developer are awesome. If there is one thing for which you should buy Frase then that will be its support team and the developer. They really care about the user feedback and responds effectively patching all the shortcomings and helping us to use the tool effectively.
cons: Limited of Language to English only(As of today). Though the developer has promised that other languages will be added soon and I trust them. Direct export to WordPress is not present(As of today) Keyword density cannot be ascertained. Neither integration with other keyword research tool is present.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Most cleanest & Advanced Content Creation tool for SEO Writers
description: Great but expensive. We use the Addon only when there is a need and then discontinue it
author: Shivaharsh M.
pros: The UI/UX is very well thought about. When a user researches a particular topic, the entire dashboard gives the writer a complete overview of the topic. The Headings (h1,h2), SERP Analysis, Questions asked, Reddit, PAA.
cons: Expensive due to Writing and SEO Addon. Other tools provide this along with monthly subscription whereas Frase charges it as an Addon
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Buggy & Poor User Interface
author: Kira K.
pros: The promise of better SEO. However, the required keywords feature doest not function. You can not control the length of the text very well.
cons: The user interface of Frase.io left much to be desired. It felt less intuitive, buggy, and glitchy, especially when compared to its competitors. I encountered issues with non-responsive buttons, the tool simply ignored required keywords, the AI writer seemed to go off the rails at times ignoring the instructions, and other issues. In one instance, the entire text lacked the letter "r", resulting in numerous misspellings. Despite only being a few days past the free trial period, they declined to issue a refund. I'd recommend exploring other tools that offer a smoother experience. Their customer support seemed indifferent to our feedback, which is disappointing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Frase is an essential part of my content strategy
description: I love it! It's simple and straightforward to use. Usually when I'm learning about a new tool, I have to dig into the documentation to understand how to use it — that was not the case with Frase. I don't think I looked at any knowledge base articles or how to videos yet I immediately grasped how to use it. I run a content writing agency and all my writers now use Frase as part of the outlining/draft creation process. Frase essentially replaces me having to write a brief for my writers — they are empowered to brief themselves!
author: Maddy O.
pros: I love that Frase provides an affordable alternative to tools like Clearscope and Content Harmony. Is it 100% on par with these tools? No. Some of the nuance is lost in terms of the exact keywords to include in a new content piece to rank for SEO but the tool acts as a super useful content brief to assist with research and content structure.
cons: See my answer for "Pros" but essentially, this tool doesn't yet replace the use of a tool like Ahrefs for identifying relevant long-tail keyword options, complete with data about monthly search volume and keyword difficulty. An integration could be cool even if it doesn't make sense for Frase to focus on this functionality from a proprietary standpoint. I haven't been able to understand how to correctly share a brief with another user who has an account but it's not an issue I'm that worried about as my account allows for the creation of unlimited documents, anyway.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Frase is a winner - a promising tool with excellent potential
description: Overall, we would say Frase is a very powerful and promising tool. The Frase support team is super responsive and is committed to helping you out. If you're willing to overlook the minor bugs and are willing to be patient, Frase is a winner. Our only recommendation to the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] of Frase is to focus more on the tool’s stability improvements - we know measures are already being put in place for this. Every startup is bound to have teething issues. So does Frase. But given its time saving features, its future potential, and excellent customer service and dedication of the support team, Frase stands out.
author: Revathi K.
pros: **PROS** (1.) **Cuts down time taken to create content briefs**, as it makes research a breeze - this is very useful especially if you have a team of content writers. It lets you quickly create content briefs and distribute it to your team in various formats - PDF, shareable links, etc. (2.) **Speaking of research**, it lets you find out what kind of questions people are asking around your topic. This helps tailor your content accordingly. (3.) **One-click add:** You can scan the results on the right, and easily import large content summaries into your document with just a few clicks. (4.) **Comes with a rich content editor:** helpful if you want to directly edit your imports to create your content. (5.) **Easily integrates with your Google Search Console**, sorts all the high performing keywords, and gives you an option to import and optimize your existing blog content. We think this is a fantastic feature. (6.) **Answers feature:** we haven’t tested this out yet, but it sounds extremely promising. Frase’s bot crawls your website to understand its content. The idea is, when your website visitor asks a question, the chatbot will deliver an appropriate answer. However, what we’re unsure of yet is whether the existing content on our website itself needs to be optimized for this to work correctly.
cons: (1.) **Not very intuitive at the outset.** If we hadn’t watched a few demos, it would have been hard for me to figure out how to use the tool. Even after watching the demos, it takes a bit of getting used to. (2.) **There are minor bugs in the UI**, but we’re willing to overlook it because of the Lifetime/Onetime deal. (3.) **There is no bulk download or link sharing feature:** let’s say you create a dozen content briefs. You have to click on one document at a time to download or share it. But if you add a team member and give them access to the tool, they will have access to all the documents via a shared workspace. (4.) **Frase kept throwing our users out several times**. We’ve heard in Facebook Groups that Frase has been having some performance issues. The support folks at Frase are highly committed and very responsive, and hopefully stability improvements will be put in place soon. (5.) **We found a bug in #5 under PROS **- it didn't import content from one of our existing blogs. We have reached out to support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very powerful and easy to use SEO tool
description: It's been a generally great experience as they are always updating and adding new features to the product.
author: Teslim A.
pros: Frase makes it really easy to find topics and keywords to write about and the content brief feature is a game-changer. Also, you can easily find keyword opportunities to help you rank faster.
cons: The AI writing requires paying for an additional monthly addon. As an early adopter, I wish I could get this with better limits without extra addon cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Save Hours Creating Professional Copy Briefs
description: The product was very easy to use. In fact, the learning curve is almost nothing. You can be producing high quality copy briefs in minutes. The product does offer other features, but at this stage we are not using them. Brilliant!
author: Tony G.
pros: Easy. Easy. Easy. It's almost everything you need to know about this app. It took (literally) minutes to navigate my way through and be producing excellent copy briefs - stuff that would have taken me 3-4 hours can be completed in 30 minutes. For lower level copy briefs (maybe for T2 or T3 backlinks) the job can be done in under five minutes by professionals who are experienced at producing such briefs.
cons: Really, there is nothing not to like about this software. For those responsible for producing copy briefs it is just a killer application. Truthfully, the integration of a solid keyword checking tool might improve the UX a little, but it's very easy to use a web based keyword checker like Keywords Everywhere. If I were the developers of Frase I'd look at maybe exploiting some API's to make that happen. There's really no need for a proprietary tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The answer to my biggest problem
description: My business is a small start up, with limited resources. I've literally been laying awake at night trying to figure out how I'm going to provide my users with show stopping content on a regular basis. With my blog planning calendar full to the brim of ideas, the time suck of actually getting these articles researched and published has been causing me to come out in hives! Then there is the SEO aspect, which to a small business owner means a huge learning curve, and large amounts of curse learning time. The SEO optimising aspect of Frase has blown me away, and given me the confidence to get out there and create.
author: Sara H.
pros: The dashboard is easy to navigate, and works perfectly, right out of the gate. It has been thoughtfully designed, with ease of use for the user in mind. Once you've decided on your research topic, you enter the split screen editor, which is unbelievable. Research of this nature used to end up with a desk covered in printed material, Ipads and tablets utilised for additional screen space, mountains of notes and scribblings. Frase has put an end to this by providing absolutely everything needed within the split screen editor. A complete gamechanger for my business. In fact Frase adds value to the content you are researching, as the editor gives you the option to ask more questions, leading you down paths that you had not considered. This helps you to construct a detailed brief in a ridiculously short period of time.
cons: I can honestly say not a thing at this point, the software has been fantastic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Frase, my writing buddy forever
author: Sayali S.
pros: With Frase I never have writers block. I write at least a quality blog daily. I just pick a keyword from a list I keep and let Frase do the rest. I am so glad I picked up Frase on a lifetime deal. And even now that the AI writing assistant is out, I've gone for it too, simply because the initial product is already so powerful.
cons: The AI writing assistant is still not up to mark, especially when compared to competitors such as Jarvis. To be fair, it needs more time, simply because it is a proprietary system that's not GPT based. So for myself at least, I can tolerate the learning time and the repetitions for now.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A Writing Boss
description: I have used Jasper, Frase, Rytr, and closercopy. But, I like the Frase over these tools as my writing assistant. Because, I don't need to compare the competitors one by one. I find the competition here and can easily beat them to follow the NLP technology of Frase. I highly recommend Frase to must try at least once.

pros: 1. Competitors Analysis 2. SERP 3. NLP 4. Plagiarism Free A lot of best features at a single place.
cons: Every new product or service needs to be improved. So, I think there's nothing much important that can be considered as a Con.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Frase is a Serious Player in the Content Research and Creation Game Already
description: I've had a good experience so far with Frase. They're not as mature as other alternatives, but in the time I've been using them, they've added many features and enhancements.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Frase has saved me hours with content research, planning, and optimization updates. I run all my content now through Frase to create article guidelines. After the articles are written, I'll use Frase again for optimization opporutinities for SEO.
cons: Frase is still in its early days, so it's not as fully featured with the "nice to haves." The core functionalities and features are all there, but there are things like filtering that it didn't have. The team has been active and fast to provide bug fixes and UI/UX enhancements based on user feedback.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Exceptional
description: Simply superb tool for content creators and competitor's content analysis
author: harshit G.
pros: 1. Search Console integration - Give you an idea of which keywords you have to focus on immediately. The problem with the search console is there is no categorization of top keywords according to a particular set of keywords. But in the Frase, they will categorize it. For example - "Amazon App Download" "Amazon App latest apk download" with the Impression , Click, CTR .. so it helps you in understanding the top keywords and where your content is lacking which is absolutely phenomenal. 2 - Content creation - Helps in by fetching topics from the top 20 sources which definitely helps in building detailed and rich content than most of your competitors. 3- AI Bot - Integrate in your website and you can train it for specific questions which are very cool.
cons: Website Crawl Limit. It should be more and automatic
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Effortless and Easy to Use Content Creation
description: Bypassing the research process and gathering all the keywords and key terms, Frase puts all the questions and relevant information at my fingertips to raise my content level to compete against all the big-name authors and powerful players who dominate page one of Google. Seeing where my document stands, knowing that my material is well-optimized, is an inspiring feeling. I benefit much from using Frase because it enables me to share stuff in a shorter timeframe. After working on Frase for two weeks, I was able to supply material for a quarter for my company. That's a win if I can manage to focus on other critical projects and tasks while performing that action. It's easy to create optimized content with Frase.
author: abdullah S.
pros: As a writer, I was looking for an SEO tool that would be simple to use and intuitive. With Frase, it's nice to know the updates are easy enough for me to understand to stay up-to-date with new features. Companies like mine who rely on content marketing as part of their business strategy simplify our process in producing concise yet rich articles or blog posts about important topics such as social media trends or website design suggestions.
cons: I'm not a huge fan of the "add links" function update in Frase. I used to be able to copy and paste my link from another site, but now if you do that it automatically changes your text into plaintext instead of hyperlinked content.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: When You Come For The King You Better Not Miss
description: Frase has allowed me to produce better content to be found in the SERPS and that means more clients for me. This is the best SaaS product I have ever found. I cannot rate it high enough it has changed my legal practice. It is inspired and brilliant it is a must buy.
author: Garrick M.
pros: Frase is the best SaaS product I have seen. I wish I would have got this product when it was on AppSumo. I am still mad at myself. I did the free trial and I was blown away. It was everything I could wish for. So, I went ahead and got the monthly subscription. Let me tell you, this product is Amazing. I just use it to optimize my content and to make new content for my pages on my website. I love how it takes the SERP rankings of your competitors and allows you to see what they are doing. Not only is the AI learning, you are learning. I am a solo going against some of the biggest SEO companies in the nation and my state. I see what they do via this product and my pages get better. I love this product.
cons: The price and it is not even the price, because this product is worth more, it just pains me to know you could have got this at AppSumo. I think this product is so valuable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Content Creation Game Changer
author: Jon Clark -.
pros: We used to manually mine the first page results to establish a content outline for our writers. Now with Frase, we research the results, build the outline, and seed our content team with content snippets, reference links, and key data points to include in the article. The time it has given us back has paid for the tool many times over already.

review_title: Speed up your Research
description: As soon as I got Frase I took the opportunity to do a couple of trial runs with it. I created the base documents for a few new articles. It literally took seconds for the software to produce the information I was looking for. Literally faster than I could possibly do it. And I am really good with Google. I am the person that you called when you can’t find something yourself. I’m very happy with the quality of the research that Frase creates for you. As an experiment, I create a document for a few of the women in my business group. I forwarded them along so that they would have some ideas for both article Creation as well as video creation. They were all quite excited about the results of the receipt. In reality, I created all of this in well under 30 minutes. There is no way without frames that I would’ve been able to have created these documents that quickly. I’m excited to see where this product goes.

pros: * easy to use/understand * fast * clear results * responsive development team
cons: * it's new, so there is room to grow, but generally there are no cons

review_title: Awesome Ai Help Bot For My Site
description: A fantastic experience after the usual first hour or two steep learning curve.
author: Matthew C.
pros: This is a fantastic product. I don't use it exactly as per the guidelines, but as I train its answers, I can legitimately see it saving me thousands in customer service agents per year. For 60% of answers its already more accurate than my staff, because I get to train it and it tells them exactly what I say every time. If your are on the fence, give it a go, as its definitely a top tier product.
cons: The initial scrapes gave somewhat bad answers, but maybe I did it wrong. I later scraped just a few key pages and then it was far easier to train.
